blk_total_portfolio_metrics.name: Total Portfolio — Key Metrics
blk_total_portfolio_metrics.description: Headline metrics for the iShares brand viewed as a single aggregate portfolio: total net assets, weighted total return, and annual income.

blk_alloc_asset_class.name: Asset Class Allocation
blk_alloc_asset_class.description: Equity / Fixed Income / Commodity / Cash / Multi-Asset, attributed at the security level after look-through.

blk_alloc_strategy.name: Investment Strategy Allocation
blk_alloc_strategy.description: BlackRock fund-level sub-asset-class — Large Cap, Investment Grade, High Yield, Sovereign, Real Estate, Inflation-Linked, etc.

blk_alloc_investment_style.name: Active vs Index
blk_alloc_investment_style.description: Aggregate net assets by investment style — index-tracking vs active vs smart beta.

blk_alloc_sector.name: Sector Allocation
blk_alloc_sector.description: Aggregate equity/credit sector exposure across the entire portfolio after look-through.

blk_alloc_region.name: Regional Allocation (fund-level)
blk_alloc_region.description: Total net assets by BlackRock-classified region (North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Emerging Markets, etc.).

blk_alloc_country.name: Geographic Allocation (security-level)
blk_alloc_country.description: Country exposure at the underlying-security level, summed via look-through.

blk_alloc_market_type.name: Developed vs Emerging Market
blk_alloc_market_type.description: Fund-level split between Developed and Emerging market exposures.

blk_alloc_currency.name: Currency Exposure
blk_alloc_currency.description: Underlying-security currency exposure across the entire portfolio.

blk_alloc_product_view.name: Product Type
blk_alloc_product_view.description: Net assets by product type — iShares ETFs, mutual funds, closed-end funds.

blk_total_top_holdings.name: Top Underlying Holdings
blk_total_top_holdings.description: Largest individual securities across the entire portfolio, summed across every fund that holds them.

blk_total_funds_table.name: Funds — sortable, filterable
blk_total_funds_table.description: Every fund in the universe with classification, net assets and BlackRock-published total return / yield / premium-discount metrics.

blk_returns_attribution_table.name: Return Attribution by Category
blk_returns_attribution_table.description: Each category's contribution to portfolio total return (= category weight × category return).

blk_distributions_attribution_table.name: Realized Distributions by Category
blk_distributions_attribution_table.description: Actual dollar distributions paid in the period, parsed from BlackRock's Distributions sheet.

blk_correlation_heatmap.name: Daily-Return Correlation
blk_correlation_heatmap.description: Pairwise correlation of daily NAV returns across the largest funds by net assets. Lower triangle only; numeric correlations overlaid on each cell. Run `python -m openbb_blackrock.ingest --nav-history` to populate.

params.label: Investment Style
params.description: Filter universe by investment style. Pick two (comma-separated) to compare e.g. Active vs Index.

params.label: Asset Class
params.description: Restrict universe to one or more fund-level asset classes.

params.label: Country (any holding)
params.description: Funds whose underlying holdings touch any of the selected countries.

params.label: Sector (any holding)
params.description: Funds whose underlying holdings touch any of the selected sectors.

blk_drill_fund_metrics.name: Fund — Key Stats
blk_drill_fund_metrics.description: Headline numbers for the selected fund: net assets, NAV-based total return (YTD / 1Y / 3Y / 5Y / 10Y), 30-day SEC yield and 12-month yield.

blk_drill_fund_holdings_table.name: Holdings — Selected Fund
blk_drill_fund_holdings_table.description: Line-by-line holdings of the selected fund.

params.label: As-of Date (optional)
params.description: Pick a US trading day to view a historical snapshot. Empty = latest. Misses fall back to the nearest prior trading day.

blk_drill_fund_distributions.name: Distribution History — Selected Fund
blk_drill_fund_distributions.description: Every distribution the selected fund has paid: Record / Ex / Payable dates, with breakdown by Income / ST / LT Cap Gains / Return of Capital.

blk_drill_fund_nav_history.name: NAV History — Selected Fund
blk_drill_fund_nav_history.description: Daily NAV per share, shares outstanding, ex-dividends and computed daily total return for the selected fund.

blk_total_returns_metrics.name: Total Portfolio — Total Return
blk_total_returns_metrics.description: Weighted total return across the portfolio for YTD / 1Y / 3Y / 5Y / 10Y / Since Inception.

blk_total_top_performers.name: Top Performers — 1 Year
blk_total_top_performers.description: The best-performing iShares funds by 1-year NAV total return.

blk_total_bottom_performers.name: Bottom Performers — 1 Year
blk_total_bottom_performers.description: The worst-performing iShares funds by 1-year NAV total return.

blk_byfund_sector.name: Sector — Current vs 1Y Ago
blk_byfund_sector.description: Sector exposure for the selected fund: current snapshot vs ~1 year ago, side-by-side. 1Y-ago snapshot is fetched live from BlackRock on first request and cached.

blk_byfund_top10_compare.name: Top 10 Holdings — Current vs 1Y Ago
blk_byfund_top10_compare.description: Top 10 holdings of the current snapshot, with each ticker's weight one year ago shown side-by-side. Tickers absent from the 1Y-ago snapshot show 0 (added since). 1Y-ago snapshot is fetched live and cached.

blk_byfund_country.name: Country — Current vs 1Y Ago
blk_byfund_country.description: Country exposure for the selected fund: current snapshot vs ~1 year ago, side-by-side. 1Y-ago snapshot is fetched live from BlackRock on first request and cached.

blk_byfund_asset_class.name: Asset Class — Current vs 1Y Ago
blk_byfund_asset_class.description: Asset class exposure for the selected fund: current snapshot vs ~1 year ago, side-by-side. 1Y-ago snapshot is fetched live from BlackRock on first request and cached.

blk_drill_fund_documents.name: Fund — Regulatory Documents
blk_drill_fund_documents.description: iShares US regulatory PDFs (Fact Sheet, Prospectus, Annual Report, etc.) for the selected fund.

params.label: Documents
params.description: Regulatory documents available for this fund.

blk_holding_metrics.name: Security — Key Metrics
blk_holding_metrics.description: Total exposure, brand weight, fund count, asset class, and sector for the selected security across the iShares universe.

blk_holding_funds_table.name: Funds Holding This Security
blk_holding_funds_table.description: Every iShares fund that holds the selected security, with that fund’s exposure, weight, and 1-year return.

blk_top_by_asset_class.name: Top Securities — By Asset Class
blk_top_by_asset_class.description: Top securities by total USD exposure across all funds, filtered by asset class.

blk_top_by_sector.name: Top Securities — By Sector
blk_top_by_sector.description: Top securities by total USD exposure across all funds, filtered by sector.

blk_top_by_country.name: Top Securities — By Country
blk_top_by_country.description: Top securities by total USD exposure across all funds, filtered by country.

blk_fund_growth_10k.name: Growth of Hypothetical $10,000
blk_fund_growth_10k.description: Plots the growth of a hypothetical $10,000 investment from inception for the selected fund (NAV total return) versus its benchmark index. Data sourced from iShares.

blk_fund_performance.name: Fund Performance — Total Returns
blk_fund_performance.description: Total return table for the selected fund (NAV) vs benchmark across multiple time periods. Switch tabs for Average Annual, Cumulative, or Calendar Year returns.
